Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment; Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee; For Et Al.
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To May-22-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Suzanne Rehmani appeared by telephone for Nguyet Anh To (Petitioner).
Mark Watson appeared by telephone for Ching Wong and Jennifer Walker (Respondents).

Mr. Watson requested a continuance stating that his Client had two deaths in the family, that mediation was not held and that he is working on global mediation. Ms. Rehmani stated that they had mediation scheduled, expressed difficulty of having to scheduling everyone again and raised the issue of Mr. Watson representing the Trustee and a Beneficiary. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Amendment; Suspend and Remove Successor Trustee and Appointment of Successor Trustee, etc. was set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on May 28, 2017 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open Court). Status of mediation was set for April 3, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment; Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee; For Et Al.
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Watson for and with (respondent) Ching Wong. Suzanne Rehmani (via court call) for (petitioner) Nguyet Anh To.

The Court confirmed that the filing of the accounting has been done and asked about the status of mediation. Mr. Watson stated that the mediation date is November 2, 2016. Ms. Rehmani reported that there is a related civil matter regarding legal malpractice and elder abuse, that the want to do a global mediation, that November 2, 2016 will not work and that they may need to move the date to December or January. Mr. Watson stated that the civil case had been stayed for issues to be ruled on in this case. The Court confirmed with counsel that all matters would be mediated together and continued the Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Amendment, etc., to January 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status on filing an accounting was taken off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment; Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee; For Et Al.
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Salvatore Picariello (by CourtCall) for petitioner Nguyet Anh To; Suzanne Rehmani (by CourtCall) for petitioner Nguyet Anh To; Mark Watson for and with Ching Wong and for Jennifer Walker.

Mr. Watson stated that he was sick with bronchitis so he was unable to file the accounting. He has now finished preparing it and is ready to file it today. Ms. Rehmani requested that the hearing on the petition be continued for 45 days, but to proceed with a hearing on the accounting. Mr. Watson stated that the parties were in mediation on the issues in the petition, and that he wanted to complete the mediation process before any future hearing on the petition. The court continued the status hearing re the status of the accounting only to August 16, 2016 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Court continued the status hearing for all other issues on the petition to October 17, 2016 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kevin Macksoud. (Not reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment; Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee; For Et Al.
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Continued To Jun-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Salvatore Picariello & Suzanne Rehmani (via Court Call) for (petitioner) Nguyet Anh To. Mark Watson for (respondents) Ching Wong & Jennifer Walker.

The Court stated that it received the documents filed on Friday and asked if there was interest in mediation. Ms. Rehmani stated that they would consider it but that they want the trustee to file a formal accounting. Mr. Watson stated that the accounting could be filed in 3 weeks, that an elder abuse case was set with the same facts which were gutted by demurrers and that they are willing to mediate. Ms. Rehmani stated that they have no objections to mediation. The Court set a September 30, 2016 deadline for mediation. Ms. Rehmani stated that they have an issue with the funds being used, that the law firm represents both the trustee and beneficiaries and that they want the funds placed into a blocked account. Mr. Watson stated that there is no proof that anything is at issue. Ms. Rehmani stated that in regards to the preliminary accounting if they cannot get protection today they will need to file a petition. The petition to determine validity of purported trust amendment; suspend and remove successor trustee and appointment of successor trustee was continued to June 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing the accounting.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
